testcase.name: findBestView > returns default view for empty input
findBestView > returns close-up view for a single marker
findBestView > centers on Europe with tight zoom for nearby markers
findBestView > centers of gravity attact the center, but outlyers affect the zoom
findBestView > centers on Europe with wide zoom when most markers are there
findBestView > centers on western US when most markers are there
findBestView > centers mid-Atlantic for transatlantic markers
findBestView > picks perpendicular center for antipodal markers
findBestView > centers near antimeridian for markers straddling it
findBestView > zooms out for regional European spread
findBestView > zooms way out for global spread
extractCoordsFromGeoJson > extracts coords from Point features
extractCoordsFromGeoJson > returns empty array for no features
